title: Ownership metadata
human_acceptance_or_explicit_next_goal_b: Next boundary recorded as RP00.P01.M05.S07 Reference relationship map; no sensitive production action approved by this subphase.

findings.title: Protective may_not_mutate entries are allow-listed but not required in validated instances
findings.details: validateHumanApprovalOwnershipMetadata enforces that present may_reference/may_not_mutate entries fall within the policy allowlist and are non-empty, but does not require the protective boundaries (human_approval_decisions, human_approval_actor_identity) to actually be present in a given instance. A conforming object could omit them and still pass. The HUMAN_APPROVAL_OWNERSHIP_POLICY allowlist, the contract definition, and the synthetic fixture all include them, and the validator script asserts the fixture validates, so the documented protection is intact for this slice.
findings.recommendation: Acceptable for the ownership-metadata slice. Required-field presence enforcement is explicitly deferred to the HumanApproval Required field registry (RP00.P01.M05.S08); confirm the protective boundaries become mandatory there.

findings.title: Closeout evidence files not present in this diff (expected)
findings.details: The contract validation_command_matrix and construction-inspection checks reference docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p01-m05-s06/claude-review-result.json and construction-inspection.json (with human_approval_ownership_metadata_verified), which are not part of the implementation diff. This C00 read-only review is itself the input to that evidence record.
findings.recommendation: Record this review's adjudication plus the construction inspection under the S06 evidence root before promoting to production_ready; the validator already enforces their presence/shape at closeout.
